'''thafupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oocyan|oocyan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oocyan|oocyan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thafupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæfipith|thæfipith]] || [[word:thæfipij|thæfipij]] || [[word:thæfipish|thæfipish]] || [[word:thæfipi|thæfipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thafufuputh|thafufuputh]] || [[word:thafufupuj|thafufupuj]] || [[word:thafufupush|thafufupush]] || [[word:thafufupu|thafufupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafuputh|thafuputh]] || [[word:thafupuj|thafupuj]] || [[word:thafupush|thafupush]] || [[word:thafupu|thafupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafufputh|thafufputh]] || [[word:thafufpuj|thafufpuj]] || [[word:thafufpush|thafufpush]] || [[word:thafufpuf|thafufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thafuputhu|thafuputhu]] || [[word:thafupuju|thafupuju]] || [[word:thafupushu|thafupushu]] || [[word:thafupuku|thafupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thafuputh|thafuputh]] || [[word:thafupuj|thafupuj]] || [[word:thafupush|thafupush]] || [[word:thafupu|thafupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thafuputhul|thafuputhul]] || [[word:thafupujul|thafupujul]] || [[word:thafupushul|thafupushul]] || [[word:thafupukul|thafupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thafuputhuthu|thafuputhuthu]] || [[word:thafupujuju|thafupujuju]] || [[word:thafupushushu|thafupushushu]] || [[word:thafupuku|thafupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thafuputhun|thafuputhun]] || [[word:thafupujun|thafupujun]] || [[word:thafupushun|thafupushun]] || [[word:thafupukun|thafupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thafuputhuoro|thafuputhuoro]] || [[word:thafupujuoro|thafupujuoro]] || [[word:thafupushuoro|thafupushuoro]] || [[word:thafupukuoro|thafupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
